channel.title: Crowd Control
channel.description: Latest releases from Crowd Control on Dropout.tv

item.title: Crowd Control Trailer
item.description:
Get ready for some good old-fashioned crowd work. New series premieres September 8th.

Duration: 02:02

Tags: Crowd Control, jacquis neal, stand up comedy, crowd work, unscripted, competitions, storytelling, cool jobs, alternative lifestyles, red flags
